name: Phase1 public project status
public_state: active edge development with published wiki, clean public link surface, and B3 GNU/Linux emulator evidence present
important_boundary: Percentages are planning estimates, not production-readiness or security-hardening claims. B3 GNU/Linux emulator evidence is present, but full B3 validation remains not claimed.

projects.name: Phase1 operator console
projects.state: usable edge console with guarded host access, VFS, dashboards, help UI, themes, learning, and tests
projects.next_milestone: polish release-facing flows and keep safe defaults simple

projects.name: Fyr native language
projects.state: seed language and toolchain surface exist with scripts, tests, assertions, package checks, and docs
projects.next_milestone: expand language book, package workflow, and runtime integration

projects.name: Base1 secure host / OS track
projects.state: documentation, dry-run scripts, release archives, validation gates, recovery planning, x86_64 boot planning, wiki guardrails, and B3 GNU/Linux emulator stage evidence are present; full B3 remains not claimed
projects.next_milestone: add B3 UEFI proof and kernel/initrd handoff evidence, then promote a reviewed validation report without over-claiming

projects.name: X200 / Libreboot hardware path
projects.state: X200 Linux-libre host can stage local kernel/initrd into B3 GNU/Linux emulator evidence; USB staging, framebuffer proof paths, recovery notes, and safety gates remain evidence-bound
projects.next_milestone: capture repeatable physical boot evidence and keep emulator, USB, and hardware claims separated

projects.name: Security and crypto policy
projects.state: trust model, crypto policy roadmap, provider registry, profile docs, config schema, and integrity checks are present
projects.next_milestone: move from documentation policy into scoped implementation only after tests and review evidence

projects.name: Website and public docs
projects.state: public site, status page, status JSON, badge endpoint, native GitHub Wiki, refreshed source wiki, organized docs, asset policy, Pages routing, clean public link checks, and B3 evidence status wording are in place
projects.next_milestone: publish reviewed B3 evidence docs after UEFI and handoff evidence are complete

projects.name: Repository organization
projects.state: minimal root has 12 tracked files, 16 top-level folders, 0 unplanned root files, 0 tracked build files, 0 root status duplicates, and clean Base1 link-check output
projects.next_milestone: keep generated artifacts out of Git and keep compatibility links clean as work lands

non_claims: B3 GNU/Linux emulator evidence is not full B3 completion
